title: antirrhinum tortuosum var. faurei
intro: Antirrhinum tortuosum var. faurei, also known as the twisted snapdragon, is a plant species belonging to the snapdragon family (Plantaginaceae). Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating coughs and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Antirrhinum tortuosum var. faurei include soothing sore throats, reducing congestion, and alleviating bronchitis symptoms. Herbal preparations of the plant can be found in the form of teas, infusions, or tinctures, often used to treat respiratory conditions and promote overall well-being.
